chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1317 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 4447/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For hearing of main case 03-03-2025 Mr. Shiraz Ali Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh 1. Urgency granted. 2. Petitioner seeks implementation on disable quota, however, he has not placed anything on record to suggest that his entitlement has been denied by any official respondents. While Petitioner remains at liberty to apply in the said quota before any designated forum, no case is made out to entertain this petition in the present facts and circumstances when the implementation sought has not been denied. Petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
